ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Books, Home & Kitchen) */,
  "amazon_link" TEXT /* Amazon link to the product */,
  "total_mentions" INTEGER /* Total number of mentions across all platforms */,
  "subreddit_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions in specific subreddits */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the book */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subreddits" (
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subreddit */,
  "subreddit_name" TEXT /* Name of the subreddit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subreddit */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the subreddit */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the subreddit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subreddit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being mentioned */,
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit where the mention occurs */,
  "mention_date" TEXT /* Date when the mention was recorded */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* Count of mentions on that specific date */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the mention */,
  "mention_context" TEXT /* Brief context of the mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_subreddit_id FOREIGN KEY ("subreddit_id") REFERENCES subreddits ("subreddit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Campaign start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Campaign end date */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., sales, mentions) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend record */,
  "mention_growth" REAL /* Growth in mentions compared to the previous period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
